name: lsap-1
description: LSAP-1 — literary space annotation instrument + generative engine (monorepo root)

scripts.dev:api: cd backend && uv run uvicorn lsap.api.app:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.lint:api: cd backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.setup: cd backend && uv sync && cd ../frontend && npm install
